rationale: Gov't Code §2306.056 governs committee appointments for a board under that chapter. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 2306.056. COMMITTEES. (a) The presiding officer may appoint a committee composed of board members to carry out the board's duties.
_note: No conflict; cited rule concerns board committees, not property tax exemptions.
